phrases.text_local: Onde fica a varanda da sala de degustação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DUH SAH-luh DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the original cask cellar is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a adega de barris originais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH uh-DEH-guh DIH buh-REESH aw-ree-zhee-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: The original casks are part of the historic wine-making process.

likely_response.local: Na cave, à esquerda das escadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH KAH-vih, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DUHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the basement, to the left of the stairs.

responses.english: In the basement, to the left of the stairs.
responses.phonetic: NUH KAH-vih, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DUHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
responses.french: Na cave, à esquerda das escadas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the estufagem exhibit is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a exposição do processo estufagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN DOO proo-SEH-soo shtoo-FAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: A estufagem aquece artificialmente o vinho para simular viagens marítimas, técnica tradicional única da ilha.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o processo estufagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW proo-SEH-soo shtoo-FAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the estufagem process exhibit.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the estufagem process exhibit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW proo-SEH-soo shtoo-FAH-zhayng.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o processo estufagem.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a varanda da sala de degustação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DUH SAH-luh DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao responsável da prova.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH PRAW-vuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the museum guide or the tasting host.

responses.english: Ask the museum guide or the tasting host.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH PRAW-vuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao responsável da prova.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a prensa de vinho do século XVI?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH PRAYNG-suh DIH VEE-nyoo DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-zuh-SEHEESH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao enólogo na área de exposição.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW eh-NAW-loo-goo NUH AH-reeuh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the museum guide or the wine expert in the exhibition area.

responses.english: Ask the museum guide or the wine expert in the exhibition area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW eh-NAW-loo-goo NUH AH-reeuh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia turístico ou ao enólogo na área de exposição.
